lines.en_lit: might even in the courtyard. the verse states “in the Tent of Meeting,” I have only in the Tent of Meeting that was in the desert, from where Shiloh, and the Eternal House, The verse states “in the Sanctuary,”

I have only during the burning from where during the presentations of the blood The verse states: “When he goes in to make atonement,” I have only his entrance from where his exit? The verse states: “Until he comes out.”

“And have made atonement for himself, and for his household, and for all the assembly of Israel” his atonement precedes the atonement of his household; the atonement of his household precedes that atonement of his brethren, the priests; the atonement of his brethren, the priests, precedes the atonement of the entire community of Israel.

The Master said I have only during the burning where been inferred? Rava said, and similarly Rabbi Yitzḥak bar Avdimi said, and similarly Rabbi Elazar said: verse states: “And have made atonement for himself, and for his household, and for all the assembly of Israel.” Which atonement is the same for him, and for his household, and for his brethren, the priests, and for the entire community of Israel? You must say this is the burning of the incense.

incense effect atonement? Yes, as Rabbi Ḥananya teaches We learned of the incense that it effects atonement, it is stated: “And he put on the incense and made atonement for the people” And the school of Rabbi Yishmael taught: For what does incense effect atonement? For slander. Let something that in secret, come and effect atonement for an act done in secret,

We learned there: They remove from between the Entrance Hall and the altar during the burning Rabbi Elazar said: They taught only during the burning of the Sanctuary, but during the burning in the innermost remove from the Sanctuary. They do not need to remove themselves between the Entrance Hall and the altar.

Rav Adda bar Ahava raised an objection and some say it unattributed: Rabbi Yosei says: Just as they remove from between the Entrance Hall and the altar during the burning they similarly remove during the presentations of the bull of the anointed priest, of the bull for an unwitting sin of the goats of idol worship

what higher standard is to the Sanctuary relative to between the Entrance Hall and the altar? Only that in the Sanctuary remove both during the burning and also not during the burning. between the Entrance Hall and the altar remove only during the burning
In any case, during the burning they do remove What, is it not during the burning of the innermost

No, during the burning of the of the Sanctuary. If so, What higher standard Are there not more? Surely, there is this higher standard, that whereas in the Sanctuary remove both during its own, burning and during the burning of the innermost but in between the Entrance Hall and the altar they remove only during the burning of the Sanctuary.
This is is teaching: only that in the Sanctuary remove both during the burning and also not during the burning from between the Entrance Hall and the altar they do not remove
